characters.appearance: A middle-aged Indian woman in her late 50s or early 60s with a medium build and a fair complexion. She has dark hair tied back neatly from her face, which has some visible wrinkles. Her expression is initially one of concern and suspicion.
characters.wardrobe: A light-colored salwar kameez with a blue and grey checkered pattern. She has a light beige dupatta with a pink floral print draped over one shoulder. She wears simple gold bangles on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Concerned, inquisitive, and slightly judgmental at the beginning.

characters.appearance: A young Indian woman in her late 20s or early 30s with a slim build and a fair complexion. She has long, dark hair and dark eyes. Her face is youthful and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: A white top under a magenta-colored dupatta (headscarf) draped over her head and shoulders. She wears black track pants with two white stripes down the side.
characters.demeanor: Initially defensive, then becomes earnest, articulate, and confident as she explains her actions and later addresses the audience.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: बहू मैंने देखा है तुम दिन भर इंग्लिश में किसी से बात करती रहती हो। कौन है वो? [Daughter-in-law, I have seen you talking to someone in English all day. Who is that?]

Character B says: अरे मम्मी जी, वो कोई और नहीं है। Supernova का AI इंग्लिश ट्यूटर है। वो मुझे इंग्लिश में कैसे बात करनी है, वो सिखाता है। मैं सोच रही हूं मैं भी कोई जॉब कर लूं, इसीलिए। [Oh mother-in-law, that's no one else. It's Supernova's AI English tutor. It teaches me how to speak in English. I am thinking of getting a job, that's why.]

Character A says: क्यों? मेरे बेटे की कमाई से घर नहीं चल रहा क्या? [Why? Is my son's income not enough to run the house?]

Character B says: ऐसा नहीं है मम्मी। मैं पढ़ाई में बहुत तेज थी, लेकिन उसका कुछ कर नहीं पायी। अब बच्चे बड़े हो रहे हैं, तो मैंने सोचा कि मैं भी कुछ करूं। अगर मैं भी कमाने लगी तो उनको भी मदद मिलेगी। और आज कल हर जॉब में इंग्लिश बोलना बहुत जरूरी है। इसी लिए Supernova ऐप पर रोज़ प्रैक्टिस करती हूं। इसके AI ट्यूटर के साथ रोज़मर्रा की सिचुएशंस में बात करके मेरा कॉन्फिडेंस बहुत बढ़ गया है। अब मैं इंटरव्यू के लिए तैयार हूँ, क्योंकि मैं बिना डरे इंग्लिश बोल पाती हूं। [It's not like that, mummy. I was very good at studies, but I couldn't do anything with it. Now that the kids are growing up, I thought I should also do something. If I also start earning, he will also get help. And nowadays, speaking English is very important for every job. That's why I practice daily on the Supernova app. By talking to its AI tutor in everyday situations, my confidence has increased a lot. Now I am ready for interviews, because I can speak English without fear.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook: Mother-in-law questions the daughter-in-law about her English speaking habits.
- Problem: The daughter-in-law wants to work but needs English skills for job interviews.
- Solution: Supernova's AI tutor provides daily practice, building confidence without unrealistic hype.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: बिना डरे इंग्लिश बोलना सीखें और जॉब पाएं (Bina dare English bolna seekhein aur job paayein - Learn to speak English without fear and get a job)

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: अगर आपको भी जॉब के लिए अपनी इंग्लिश सुधारनी है, तो आज ही Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करें। [If you also want to improve your English for a job, then download the Supernova app today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Direct address to the camera by the daughter-in-law.
- Clear Call to Action (CTA) to download the Supernova app for career growth.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: बिना डरे इंग्लिश बोलना सीखें और जॉब पाएं (Bina dare English bolna seekhein aur job paayein - Learn to speak English without fear and get a job)
